name: Crawfish Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Cooked crawfish meat (8-10 lbs. live crawfish)
1/4 teaspoon White pepper or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil crawfish in unseasoned water until cooked through. Save as much of the fat as possible while peeling them.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over moderate heat.
3. Sautee onions, scallions, celery, bell pepper, and garlic for about five minutes, stirring frequently with a wooden spoon until vegetables become soft.
4. Add flour and mix well. Remove from heat and stir in the crawfish and fat. Adjust salt and peppers to taste.
5. Pour into a 9-inch piecrust and bake at 350°F for 15-20 minutes.
